title: [Catalog][Product][Configuration] Conditional sections

storefront_ui_pdp.note: 1 FAIL is design ambiguity (None option), not code bug

admin_ui.note: Delete parent blocked to preserve test data

business_rules_verified: BL-CAT-006 — Conditional section visibility before validation: hidden optional sections do not block Add to Cart
BL-PRICE-001 — Price stacking excludes hidden section option prices; verified $300/$325/$345/$300 transitions
edge_cases_verified: ECL-7.1 — State transitions: cascade hide/show, clearHiddenSectionValues() clears stale child values
Two required siblings: both appear/hide simultaneously
improvements_confirmed: XCart 3.1007.0: Add to Cart now correctly DISABLED when required sibling sections are visible but unfilled (was broken in 3.1006.0)

findings.title: None product option does not hide dependent sections
findings.description: Selecting a 'None' product option ($0) in a parent section does NOT hide dependent child sections. The visibility check treats 'None' as a valid selection. Affects CFG-PDP-037-COND and CFG-PDP-040-COND.
findings.classification: Design ambiguity — needs product team clarification
findings.recommendation: Clarify whether 'None' options should trigger hide behavior. If yes, isSectionVisible() needs to differentiate None products from real selections.

findings.title: Circular dependency not prevented at UI level
findings.description: Admin UI allows selecting a section that would create circular dependency (A depends on B which depends on A). The value is not persisted — data integrity preserved. No warning shown.
findings.recommendation: Add client-side validation to filter circular dependency options or show warning toast.

findings.title: Admin field label discrepancy
findings.description: Admin UI labels the dependency field as 'Active when section has value', not 'Depends on' as referenced in test specs. Functional behavior is correct.

blocked_reasons.CFG-CA-024: Delete parent section — deferred to avoid destroying test data for other cases
blocked_reasons.CFG-PDP-033-COND: CFG-029 product not seeded in QA environment
blocked_reasons.CFG-PDP-039-COND: SPA auto-navigation interference during cart operations

comparison_with_apr13.admin_gap_filled: Yes — CFG-CA-019 through 026 now executed (was 0 in Apr 13 due to rate limit)
comparison_with_apr13.e2e_060_reconfigure: Upgraded from partial to FULL PASS
